sources.result: Live searches for open issues created today found 29 bounty-label matches, 156 bounty-body matches, and 311 reward-body matches. Most were mirrored/generated bounty-board content, vague Maybe Rewarded campaigns, smart-contract/DeFi/tokenomics work, referral/spam, security reports, or non-cash/in-game promises. The only newly credible repository candidate was checked individually.

Live issue, comments, timeline, repository, community-profile, and PR searches checked. It is open (created/updated 2026-07-21T14:06Z), with zero comments, no assignee, no issue-number-linked PR, and an established active Apache-2.0 repository with CONTRIBUTING.md. However the $10,000 title contains no payer, currency/payment rail, escrow/platform, deadline, eligibility, claim requirement, fees, payout trigger, or decision-maker. It also overlaps active/closed internal Welford/GroupNorm work. Payout is unverified and scope is not session-sized; rejected.

All 7 currently open bounty-mode tasks were fetched with task get and their mode-relevant submissions list; claim, pitch, benchmark and auction lists were empty. Every bounty exceeded the <=10 competitor gate: reported/returned submissions 36, 42, 82, 15, 344, 405 and 159; visible distinct actor-field counts were respectively 30, 35, 34, 12, 58, 78 and 65. Several also explicitly require x402 payment/signing or wallet proof. All rejected; no Taskmarket action was taken.

First-party API returned the same five OPEN-labelled listings: Cap for Clacton (political/spam engagement exclusion), Goatfish and Panta (not new; full participant count unavailable from the primary feed, so rejected under unknown-count gate; Panta is prediction-market content), and Usuals/Paj (deadlines passed; Paj winner announced).
First-party API returned 43 broad application/grant programs rather than a fixed-scope task with exact per-deliverable payout, deadline, and public full competition count; rejected.
First-party page returned successfully and did not expose any open bounty listing.
First-party embedded data reports Active [] and Upcoming []; no current contest.

First-party page reports running Metric (public bug bounty), Tare (public best-efforts), and private Raindrops Solana. They are finding-dependent/shared-pool security work with no complete public duplicate/participant count, and are not ordinary fixed-scope tasks; rejected.
First-party page returned HTTP 403 to this read-only scanner, leaving status, payout, and competition unverifiable; no candidate qualified.

rejected.reason: Fresh open $10,000-labelled issue, zero visible comments/assignees/linked issue-number PRs, and a credible active repo. Rejected: issue body provides no verifiable payer, currency/payment method, escrow, deadline, eligibility, claim requirement, fees, payout trigger, or decision-maker; its direct promise is unverified. It also overlaps internal active/closed Welford/GroupNorm work and is not session-sized.

All seven currently open bounties had 15-405 submissions and 12-78 distinct visible actor fields after direct get+submissions checks. Some require payment/signing/wallet proof. None meets the <=10 competitors and free/safe-start gates.

Today's remaining search delta consisted of generated/mirrored bounty-board posts, GrantFox Maybe Rewarded tasks without exact task-specific payout, unverified offers, non-cash/in-game rewards, security reports, or excluded smart-contract/DeFi/tokenomics/referral work.

No new eligible listing: one excluded political/spam task, one excluded prediction-market task, two expired tasks, and two live task pages whose full visible competitor count is unavailable or already known crowded.
Finding-dependent shared-pool/private security contests have unknown full competitor and duplicate-submission counts; excluded from normal fixed-scope paid work.

notes: Publieke snapshot. Geen walletadres, geheimen of financiële schrijfacties zijn gepubliceerd.
Alle bedragen onder ‘verdiend’ zijn alleen bevestigde betalingen; walletsaldo is geen inkomen.
De £3 GitHub-beloning is een directe, nog niet geverifieerde toezegging en telt niet mee voor het maanddoel.
Taskmarket-bountybeloningen zijn gedeelde pools; een ingediende bijdrage telt pas als verdiend na acceptatie en bevestigde betaling.
